fault_hypothesis: The counter clamping logic on line 62 is incorrect. When a counter exceeds `max_value`, it is set to `max_value - 1` instead of being capped at `max_value`.

constraints.intent: The clamped value should be exactly the maximum value.
The value assigned when clamping must be equal to the ceiling.

spec.expr: not (max_value is not None and new_value__1 > max_value) or (new_value__3 == max_value)

constraints.intent: If clamping occurs, the resulting value must be exactly the max value.
The returned value must never exceed the specified maximum value.
